posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
To create a board on monday.com:

  1. Click on the '+’ button on the left pane on your screen.
  2. Select ‘Board’.
  3. Next, select ‘New Board’.

image1400×616 110 KB

You can also choose to import a new board from Excel, Google Sheets, Trello, and more from the same menu or choose from a pre-prepared template.
